is called via try/catch to maintain compatibility with standard UBIFeeSplitter."},"swapGUSDForUSDC(uint256)":{"params":{"gusdAmount":"Amount of gUSD to redeem (18 decimals)"}},"swapUSDCForGUSD(uint256)":{"params":{"usdcAmount":"Amount of USDC to deposit (6 decimals)"}}},"stateVariables":{"SCALE":{"details":"Scaling factor: 1e18 / 1e6 = 1e12"},"psmBurnedGUSD":{"details":"Gross gUSD burned by this PSM (all swapGUSDForUSDC redemptions, regardless      of whether the gUSD was originally minted by this PSM or by VaultManager).      Outstanding PSM-backed gUSD = max(0, psmMintedGUSD - psmBurnedGUSD)."},"psmMintedGUSD":{"details":"Gross gUSD ever minted by this PSM (never decremented on redemption).      Used with psmBurnedGUSD to compute outstanding PSM-backed gUSD for      the withdrawReserves solvency check.      Note: The PSM accepts redemptions from ANY gUSD holder (including      VaultManager-minted gUSD). We cannot distinguish origins at burn time,      so psmMintedGUSD is conservatively kept as gross issuance. This means      withdrawReserves may be more restrictive than necessary after cross-origin      redemptions, but it guarantees admin cannot drain reserves while original      PSM users still hold unredeemed gUSD."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"_callMintingFeeTracking(uint256,address,address,address,string)":{"notice":"Helper function to call enhanced minting fee tracking. _callMintingFeeTracking(uint256,address,.details: This is called via try/catch to maintain compatibility with standard UBIFeeSplitter.

params.gusdAmount: Amount of gUSD to redeem (18 decimals)

params.usdcAmount: Amount of USDC to deposit (6 decimals)

_callMintingFeeTracking(uint256,address,.notice: Helper function to call enhanced minting fee tracking.         Attempts to use StableUBIFeeSplitter.splitMintingFee() if available.

previewGUSDForUSDC(uint256).notice: Preview USDC out for a given gUSD input (after fee).

previewUSDCForGUSD(uint256).notice: Preview gUSD out for a given USDC input (after fee).

swapGUSDForUSDC(uint256).notice: Swap gUSD for USDC.         User sends `gusdAmount` (18-decimal), receives USDC minus fee (6-decimal).

swapUSDCForGUSD(uint256).notice: Swap USDC for gUSD.         User sends `usdcAmount` (6-decimal), receives gUSD minus fee (18-decimal).

withdrawReserves(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw USDC reserves to a recipient (e.g., for yield strategy).         Cannot withdraw below the amount needed to back outstanding gUSD.
